RetainedHeight.description: The retained height of soil measured from the bottom of the wall Footing.

CoverDepth.description: The distance from top of Footing to finished floor level on the exposed face.

RetentionAngle.description: A property of the material being retained measured from the horizontal plane. Property has a quantity of type Angle meassured in [rad].

GroundWaterDepth.description: The distance from the base of the Footing to ground water level.

_t.description: Optional Type discirminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
